name: IRC_TC_CAND_PKG_RESULTS
description: This table contains the package level tax credits results for the submissions.

columns.Name: TC_PKG_RESULT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: APP_DRAFT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key value to IRC_CX_APP_DRAFTS table.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key value to IRC_SUBMISSIONS table.

columns.Name: TC_REQ_PACKAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_TC_REQ_PACKAGES table.

columns.Name: PACKAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the package code used by the partner

columns.Name: PACKAGE_NAME
columns.Comments: Specifies the package name used by the partner

columns.Name: RESULT_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status code of the tax credit request.

columns.Name: CREDITS_ELIGIBLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the candidate is eligible for any tax credits.

columns.Name: TOTAL_CREDITS_ESTIMATE
columns.Comments: Specifies the total tax credits estimate for the candidate.

columns.Name: CREDITS_EST_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the currency for  tax credits estimate.

columns.Name: FEDERAL_CREDITS_ELIGIBLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the candidate is eligible for federal tax credits.

columns.Name: FEDERAL_CREDITS_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Specifies federal tax credits identifier.

columns.Name: FEDERAL_CREDITS_ESTIMATE
columns.Comments: Specifies federal credits estimate for the candidate.

columns.Name: STATE_CREDITS_ELIGIBLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the candidate is eligible for state tax credits.

columns.Name: STATE_CREDITS_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Specifies state tax credits identifier.

columns.Name: STATE_CREDITS_ESTIMATE
columns.Comments: Specifies state credits estimate for the candidate.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments provided by the partner.

columns.Name: DRAFT_ADDITIONAL_RESULTS
columns.Comments: Stores additional results payload for the draft application Tax Credits packages

columns.Name: REQUESTED_BY
columns.Comments: Stores the user who triggered the tax credit package for the submission.

columns.Name: REQUESTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date on which the tax credit package was triggered for the submission.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
